calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jennifer Marie Harford was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jennifer Marie Harford Vargas.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Reset To Mar-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jennifer Marie Harford was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to Tuesday, March 16, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Reset To Mar-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge Monica L. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Anne Bersamin, #11722.

Petitioner Jennifer Marie Harford was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to Tuesday, March 9, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
